channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Europe is pushing back on Washington’s chip war
item.description: As ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet told TechCrunch in May, what China can currently buy are older-generation deep ultraviolet tools — gear first shipped about a decade ago — the same machines the MATCH Act would now put off limits.

item.title: Want the best possible music quality from your iPhone? This underrated device will elevate your audio for just AU$59
item.description: The Sennheiser BTD 700 is an inexpensive way to upgrade your music listening, whether it be from an iPhone or laptop.

item.title: I recently got into mobile gaming — here's what's in my setup right now that makes it even more enjoyable
item.description: Adding dedicated mobile gaming gear has made my obsession with The Division: Resurgence exquisite this year — here's what I use.

item.title: The top tech Prime Day deals to shop on day two
item.description: Welcome to day two of Amazon’s four-day Prime Day event, which, if we’re being honest, looks a lot like day one. That’s actually good news, though, because many of the best deals are still around, and some new ones have joined them. If you’ve got a Prime subscription, whether through a free trial or a […]

item.title: Former Infosys chief has a new startup that wants to challenge the IT services world
item.description: Backed by Mayfield and Aramco Ventures, Vishal Sikka’s new venture brings together veterans from SAP, Infosys, and VianAI.

item.title: 'No collector's edition?': as GTA 6 pre-orders go live, Rockstar could face scrutiny if it pulls the same move as it did with Red Dead Redemption 2
item.description: We've yet to hear word of a collector's edition for Rockstar's upcoming GTA 6, but that doesn't mean we won't get one... it just might be a little different than some fans are hoping

item.title: After successfully selling over 15 cars, Faraday Future would now like you to buy its robots
item.description: Farday Future hasn't quite given up on EVs, but it's now also pitching a lineup of robots, including humanoids and a quadruped with an optional canine heads.

item.title: GTA 6 au meilleur prix : les offres sont là, suivez en live les précommandes
item.description: Grand Theft Auto VI est sans conteste le jeu le plus attendu de la décennie, et l'attente s'apprête à devenir très concrète. Rockstar Games a officialisé la nouvelle : les précommandes ouvrent officiellement ce jeudi 25 juin à 00h00. Découvrez les meilleures offres pour réserver votre voyage à Vice City au meilleur prix.

item.title: Elon suffers another day short of trillionaire status
item.description: Right now he's merely a several-hundred-billionaire, according to Bloomberg's Billionaires Index.

item.title: GTA 6 UK pre-orders are live, and we finally have a price — here's where you can order it, and what it costs
item.description: Pre-orders should be going live now — we're following it live

item.title: Your enterprise AI agents should automatically remember which model is right for which task. Mindstone built the capability with Rebel
item.description: AI agent orchestration platforms are popping up like weeds these days, but London-based AI transformation startup Mindstone's Rebel might be among the most promising I've come across. That's because the system, which officially launched this week, is a local-first, agentic AI operating system distributed under a "Fair Source" license, allowing teams of under 100 users to freely adopt and customize it to suit their needs, while those organizations with more users will require paying for an enterprise license. The marquee features are its simplicity and extensive customizability to fit any given...

item.title: 50+ of the best Prime Day tech deals, vetted by a tech editor on a budget
item.description: Mashable's tech editor found the best Prime Day tech deals of 2026. Get AirPods for $99, Kindles for $85, and save 50% on Bose headphones.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Thursday, June 25 (game #1110)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Thursday, June 25 (game #1613)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Thursday, June 25 (game #844)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: $799 Apple MacBook Pro clone gets Core Ultra 9 CPU, huge 100WHr battery, promises 24Hr battery life, and Linux compatibility
item.description: GeekBook M16 combines MacBook-inspired design, Intel Core Ultra 9 performance, a large battery, and budget pricing under $800.

item.title: GTA 6 : comment obtenir l’édition Ultimate moins cher grâce à une astuce sur le PlayStation Store
item.description: Le PlayStation Store laisse passer de l'édition Standard de GTA 6 à l'édition Ultimate après l'achat. De quoi récupérer le contenu bonus pour moins cher qu'une Ultimate achetée direct.

item.title: Our top-rated shipping label printer hits its lowest ever price for Prime Day — and the Munbyn RW403B is genuinely the best we’ve ever tested
item.description: Our senior printer editor called it "quick, quiet, and actually fun to use."

item.title: Prime Day 2026 live: Were vetting the best Amazon deals in real-time
item.description: Get live updates on the first Prime Day of 2026. We found record-low prices on AirPods, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony headphones, and more.

item.title: Cerebras stock plunges after earnings as CEO says margin outlook was misunderstood
item.description: In its first earnings report since going public, the AI chipmaker forecast a narrower gross margin in its core business, scaring investors.

item.title: One memory to rule them all? Key partner to Nvidia, ASML and TSMC brings next-gen RAM and NAND replacements even closer
item.description: IMEC has demonstrated two advances in ferroelectric memory research that could make next-generation memory possible.

item.title: Best Prime Day Deals on LED Masks and Hair Growth Tools That Actually Work
item.description: Whether you're looking to upgrade your skin care routine or invest in hair restoration, these are the best Prime Day deals on some of our favorite red light therapy devices.

item.title: 97 Prime Day Deals on Gear We Stand By, Up To 50% Off (2026)
item.description: We've gone from A to Z to find Amazon's best Prime Day deals on the gear worth owning.

item.title: How to Opt Out of Google Search’s New AI Data Training Feature
item.description: Google’s Search history update stores media uploads from your interactions, like images used in reverse image searches, for training its AI models.

item.title: Australie | L’interdiction des réseaux sociaux aux adolescents a peu d’impact, selon une étude
item.description: L’interdiction des réseaux sociaux pour les moins de 16 ans en Australie n’a eu que peu d’impact sur les habitudes de navigation des adolescents, ont déclaré jeudi des chercheurs dans l’une des premières évaluations de ces mesures pionnières à l’échelle mondiale.

item.title: More Popeyes stores face closure in franchise bankruptcy: See an updated list of locations
item.description: In a dramatic turn of events, dozens of Popeyes restaurants failed to find a bidder at a bankruptcy auction last week. Here’s what to know. More Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen locations are likely to close soon, the latest dramatic development in ongoing bankruptcy proceedings involving a prominent franchisee for the fast-food chicken chain.

item.title: On a cherché : personne ne propose GTA VI moins cher que cette offre de précommande
item.description: Toujours considéré comme le jeu vidéo le plus attendu de la décennie, GTA VI s'invite en précommande à seulement 60 euros au lieu de 80 euros chez E.leclerc, signant au passage la meilleure offre du marché pour son lancement.

item.title: How to watch South Africa vs South Korea: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch South Africa vs South Korea for free online and from anywhere as the Taeguk Warriors look to seal their place in the World Cup 2026 knockout stages.

item.title: Blink cameras are super cheap for Prime Day, but these 5 subscription-free alternatives are just as good — and deeply discounted too
item.description: Blink security cameras are excellent, but their features are very limited without a subscription so take a good look at these great value alternatives.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day is here: We found the 75+ best live deals on Apple, Sony, Kindle, and Lego favorites
item.description: Find the best Prime Day deals of 2026 on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple Watches.

item.title: The Grand Theft Auto 6 physical edition is overpriced DRM in a box
item.description: It's not the $80 physical edition we deserve, and it's also not the one we need right now.

item.title: FuelRod battery packs can be a tough sell — but Disney fans should snap up this Prime Day deal so they never run out of battery at Disney World
item.description: A FuelRod might not be the most powerful portable charger, but thanks to a Prime Day discount and Disney World’s easy swap system, it becomes a surprisingly affordable park companion for keeping your phone powered.

item.title: On a dégoté l’allié idéal contre la canicule à moins de 100 €
item.description: Le ventilateur portable 3-en-1 Shark Chillpill est l'appareil idéal pour affronter les fortes chaleurs de l'été grâce à ses multiples embouts. Normalement vendu 129,46 euros, ce modèle compact s'affiche aujourd'hui en promotion à 99,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: We vetted record-low Prime Day deals on 9 major products: Sony WH-1000XM5, Oura Ring 4, Ninja Slushi
item.description: If you judge the best Prime Day deals based on how rare their sale price is, these big brand products are confirmed at record-low pricing.
